drd_rule: Use SRC_STM_ID to get code
Look up on CCAL_CIRD_PD_MAP where CCAL_PD_ID = TAX_LOT_OPN_MSTR.CCAL_PD_ID, pick- CIRD_PD_ID AND ACTV_F = 'Y'

Lookup on Accounting Type Dimension
Use TAX_LOT_OPN_MSTR.ACG_TP_CODE 
to get ACG_TP_NM

ADJ_COST,
case when (CCY_CODE ='USD' or (SBC_EXG_RATE is NULL OR SBC_EXG_RATE = 0)) THEN ADJ_COST
ELSE 
    ADJ_COST * SBC_EXG_RATE
END SBC_ADJ_COST

FMV FAIR_MKT_VAL_OF_GIFT_OR_INHTN,
case when (CCY_CODE ='USD' or (SBC_EXG_RATE is NULL OR SBC_EXG_RATE = 0)) THEN FMV
ELSE 
    FMV * SBC_EXG_RATE
END SBC_FAIR_MKT_VAL

CASE
                        WHEN (TAX_LOT_OPN_MSTR.MISS_COST_F = 'Y' OR TAX_LOT_OPN_MSTR.null_bss_f = 'Y')
                          THEN 'Y'
                        ELSE 'N'
                     END

OPN_FCTR OPN_PRC_FCTR,
case when (CCY_CODE ='USD' or (SBC_EXG_RATE is NULL OR SBC_EXG_RATE = 0)) THEN OPN_FCTR
ELSE 
    OPN_FCTR * SBC_EXG_RATE
END SBC_OPN_PRC_FCTR
Use  TAX_LOT_TXN_EV_TP_ID in CL_VAL_ID in CL_VAL table and pick CL_VAL_NM  where CL_SCM_CD= 86

ORIG_COST COST_AMT,
case when (CCY_CODE ='USD' or (SBC_EXG_RATE is NULL OR SBC_EXG_RATE = 0)) THEN ORIG_COST
ELSE 
    ORIG_COST * SBC_EXG_RATE
END SBC_COST_AMT

ELSE

Use  SRC_RCRD_TP_ID in CL_VAL and use- CL_VAL_CD

ELSE

END SBC_UC

(CASE   
WHEN TAX_LOT_OPN_MSTR.WASH_SALE_IND ='Y' 
AND TAX_LOT_OPN_MSTR.DISALWD_WASHSALE_AMT = 0    THEN 'CBW' 
WHEN TAX_LOT_OPN_MSTR.WASH_SALE_IND ='Y' 
AND TAX_LOT_OPN_MSTR.DISALWD_WASHSALE_AMT > 0    THEN 'BOTHW' 
WHEN TAX_LOT_OPN_MSTR.WASH_SALE_IND <> 'Y' 
AND TAX_LOT_OPN_MSTR.DISALWD_WASHSALE_AMT > 0    THEN 'GLW' 
END) AS WASH_SALE_TP
